messenger.telegram.start:
Welcome to Presence Tracker!

To receive attendance challenges, send /register and reply to the bot's message with the display name you use in the meeting.

Each account may hold one registration at a time. Use /whoami to see your current registration, /unregister to release it, and /language to change the bot's language.
messenger.telegram.whoami.current_hint: Use /register to change it, or /unregister to release it.
messenger.telegram.commands.language: Choose the language for bot messages
messenger.telegram.register.prompt: Reply to this message with the display name you use in the meeting (e.g. John Smith).
messenger.telegram.language.unregistered: Register first with /register; your language preference is saved alongside the registration.
messenger.telegram.mcq.hint: Tap each option to toggle it, then Submit.
messenger.telegram.mcq.empty_alert: Select at least one option, then tap Submit.
